name: import-landed-cost
description: Calculates the landed cost of imported goods with enhanced support for bonded warehouses and free trade agreements.
long_description: Version 2.0 extends the import landed cost circuit with support for bonded warehouses and Free Trade Agreement (FTA) eligibility. It verifies not only the base landed cost calculation but also applies dynamic duty reductions for FTA-eligible goods and accounts for warehouse type selection. This is suitable for more complex international trade scenarios involving preferential trade arrangements.

private.name: customs_value
private.description: The declared customs value of the goods in USD cents

public.name: shipping_mode
public.description: Shipping mode: sea, air, rail, or road

public.name: fta_eligible
public.description: Whether goods are eligible for FTA preferential rates

public.name: landed_cost
public.description: Total landed cost in USD cents

public.name: duty_amount
public.description: Customs duty amount in USD cents (with FTA reduction if applicable)

public.name: mpf_amount
public.description: Merchandise Processing Fee in USD cents

public.name: hmf_amount
public.description: Harbor Maintenance Fee in USD cents

public.name: fta_savings
public.description: Duty savings from FTA preference in USD cents

dataset_dependencies.description: US Harmonized Tariff Schedule rates and rules
USTR Free Trade Agreement eligibility matrix by HS code and country

author: VRL Trade Working Group
security_notes: Third-party audited. Formally verified FTA eligibility logic. Bonded warehouse accounting has been tested against 50+ real-world scenarios.
performance_notes: Constraint count: 12 (vs 8 in v1.0). Proof generation time: ~150ms. Proof size: ~2.1KB.

changelog.changes: Added FTA eligibility support, bonded warehouse accounting, and formal audit
